rulings.Case Title: CARLO MONNI ET AL VS. DAWN JOHNSON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Of Issues Of Defendants Dawn Johnson And Kate Johnson As To The Complaint Of Plaintiffs Carlo Monni And Timothy Huang; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities Declaration Of Jay D. Brown Declaration Of Dawn Johnson [Served And Filed As A Separate Document] Declaration Of Kate Johnson [Served And Filed As A Separate Document] Separate Statement Of Undisputed Material Facts
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 16, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANTs DAWN JOHNSON and KATE JOHNSON's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendants are ordered to file and provide a courtesy copy of Proof of Service to the Court no later than 9:00 a.m. on June 16, 2017. The Court also notes that moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B - no courtesy copy of the motions and supporting document provided to the Court.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CARLO MONNI ET AL VS. DAWN JOHNSON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 16, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANT SOL PROPERTIES LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendants are ordered to file and provide a courtesy copy of Proof of Service to the Court no later than 9:00 a.m. on June 16, 2017. Proof of Service filed on March 30, 2017, indicating that motion was "caused" to be hand-delivered by person/persons unknown on an unknown date is insufficient.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CARLO MONNI ET AL VS. DAWN JOHNSON ET AL

rulings.Case Title: VANCE DRISCOLL ET AL VS. 1501 CALIFORNIA, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 16, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANT 1501 CALIFORNIA, LLC's Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement GRANTED. Moving party sustained its burden under Tech-Bilt, Inc. v. Woodward Clyde & Associates (1985) 38 Cal.3d 488. No opposition filed.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HONG ZHENG VS. LUN JI XU ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 16, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANT LUN XU, ZHENG XU DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. All causes of action are sufficiently alleged; and, as alleged, are not barred by the statute of limitations. Additionally, Plaintiff is allowed to plead in the alternative.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FRANK MARDEUSZ VS. MARY LACE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants John Fischer, David Bradlow And Aron Oliner'S Special Motion To Strike Under C.C.P. Section 425.16

Section 425.16 Transferred to Department 302 to be heard at 9:30 a.m. on June 16, 2017. The Honorable Ronald Evans Quidachay recused himself.= (501/REQ)
